_comment: Fields below are graded BY HAND after collection. null = not yet filled.
_tokenUsageNote: Interrupted run (no session.shutdown). input/total reconstructed from the CLI process log's per-request context-window readings (sum of the 74 'Sending request to the AI model' prompt sizes); output summed from per-message events. input is all-in (incl. cache reads); cache vs fresh split is unrecoverable, so cached/cacheWrite are null.
_estimatedCostNote: Gemini 3.5 Flash list pricing (May 2026): $1.50/M input, $9.00/M output, $0.15/M cached input. No cache/fresh split is recorded, so fresh≈peak context (~83.9k @ $1.50/M) and the rest (~3.65M cache reads @ $0.15/M) is assumed → ~$1.00. No-cache ceiling (all input @ $1.50/M) ≈ $5.93.
selfVerificationNotes: Verified only that 'pnpm build' compiled (and fixed an .npmrc/esbuild build issue) — it never opened the running app in a browser: no headless browser, screenshot, console capture, or navigation appears in the log. References to 'the browser' are about client-side JSON loading, not self-review.
_grade: Marks: pass | good | partial | poor | fail | na | null(ungraded). See RUBRIC.md. Score is computed by pnpm compile.
